subcodes.first_line: The remembrance from Baha unto him who hath attained the presence and hath quaffed, through My Name, the Self-Subsisting, My sealed wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی البهاء الی الذی فاز باللقاء و شرب باسمی القیوم رحیقی المختوم
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action
